# K M Consulting

K M Consulting is an ISO-certified and award-winning education consultancy for early childhood education institutions.

## Website

https://www.kmconsulting.org.in/

## Contact

Email: reachus@kmconsulting.org.in
WhatsApp: +91 97477 353 55

## Core Services

- Daycare, playschool and kindergarten setup
- Teacher and staff training
- Curriculum design and pedagogy development
- Management and admission guidance
- Financial management assistance
- Textbook selection and supply

## Credentials

- ISO 9001:2015 Certification
- MSME License
- AKKPSA Membership
- AMI Membership
- Best Education Consultancy Award
- UDYAM Registration: UDYAM-KL-02-0103727

## Leadership

Dr. Kenneth Mark is the Managing Director and Lead Consultant of K M Consulting.
